shortDescription.default: Internal Division 296 cost-base reset calculator (illustrative, client-side only).

longDescription.default: A client-side-only SharePoint web part that compares an SMSF's Division 296 tax with and without a cost-base reset. No server, no database, no external network calls or API permissions. Illustrative only, not advice.

features.title: Division 296 Reset Calculator
features.description: Adds the Division 296 reset calculator web part.
